questions.question: Derive the OLS estimator for multiple linear regression in matrix form.
keyPoints: Take derivative and set to zero
Requires X^T X to be invertible

questions.question: What is multicollinearity and how does it affect multiple regression?
keyPoints: Detected using VIF; addressed by removing features or regularization

questions.question: Explain the difference between R-squared and Adjusted R-squared in multiple regression.
keyPoints: R-squared always increases with more features
Adjusted R-squared better for comparing models with different feature counts
Adjusted R-squared can decrease if irrelevant features are added

questions.question: How are the F-test and t-tests used together in evaluating a multiple regression model?
keyPoints: F-test significant first, then check individual t-tests
Possible for F-test to be significant while some individual t-tests are not
